arts.ttl: Real Madrid, PSG Boosted as Liverpool’s £36M-Rated Ace Tipped for Summer Exit
arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar set to join Fenerbahçe SK, Paris Saint-Germain may be on the lookout for a new center-back when the summer transfer window opens. As Skriniar’s permanent departure nears, PSG will need to find a replacement. arts.ttl: Liverpool Propose Bold Offer to Newcastle for Arsenal, PSG’s £150M-Rated Target
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and Alexander Isak is still at Newcastle United—for now. There wasn’t much talk about him moving this winter but expect several clubs to keep an eye on him this summer. arts.ttl: Man Utd Progressing to Complete Move for £50M-Rated Man City, PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain has been strengthening its ties with Portugal through sporting advisor Luis Campos, signing players like Vitinha, João Neves, and Gonçalo Ramos. But when the summer transfer window opens, Manchester United will aim to beat PSG to a young talent they’ve both been eyeing. arts.ttl: Barcelona Ready to Sell £29M-Rated PSG Target With Liverpool, Juventus Taking Initial Steps
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is uncertain as he enters the final year of his contract after this season. Without an extension this summer, the 26-year-old could be on the move. arts.ttl: Man United send scouts to watch £200,000-a-week striker wanted by PSG?
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly send scouts to watch a £200,000-a-week striker in action ahead of a potential summer transfer.

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain is set to release a special edition kit for the 2025-26 season, continuing their unique collaboration with Jordan Brand.
